title: Dry Rubbed American Steak Skillet
description: A resinous, crispy, date-night American dish featuring salted butter, cooked to perfection in a comal, using the sous-vide method for a paleo-friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 130 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the ribeye steak with paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, black pepper, and sea salt.
Place the steak in a sous-vide bag and seal, then cook for 2 hours.
Remove the steak from the bag and pat dry with paper towels.
Heat the salted butter in a comal over medium-high heat.
Sear the steak in the comal for 2-3 minutes per side, or until a crispy crust forms.
Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing thinly against the grain.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
